title: Better Crafting Recipies
description: This mod add's the recipes to make great things
body:
# Better crafting recipes

Hi there! This mod adds new minecraft recipes to bring some uncraftable items to live and also adding some recipes that improves the gameplay... Enjoy 😉

![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/7d7430b76fa138886a0c1e9898ffcb120f769831.png)

<details align="center">
<summary>Recipes!</summary>
 
![Magma Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/f69450406a7acc84d48fc8d0a064a23dfd235dad.png)
![Elytra Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/2bc6cd2f38d38858e7be10df38ef973cf33b2ebf.png)
![Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/d63326f862e0c95d9cc30e9aa9c19a997c922c88.png)
![Dragon Egg Duplication Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/7a7fb930fbab036e0236f582242da01928406be2.png)
![Saddle Duplication Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/e3f5f79db02ce30f8bb6c60452c584c123388a82.png)
![Totem Of Undying Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/447a569704d7ce1d517ac25e99851cea4f344c43.png)
![Trident Duplication Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3J4LK0So/images/16c5076b094ffcad63479cec1fb1a9cf80d649d8.png)

</details>
